security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: https://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self';

bundle.shortDescription: Cross-platform EQ preset switcher for Windows and Linux audio backends.
bundle.longDescription: SmartEQPresetSwitcher organizes, edits, applies, imports, exports, and backs up EQ presets across supported desktop audio backends. On Windows it integrates with Equalizer APO. On Linux it provides TUI/headless operation and exports the active preset for Linux system EQ workflows such as PipeWire.
